tasks.name: Create TypeScript types for dashboard progress data

action.target: dashboard.types.ts with CourseProgressData and AssessmentScoresData interfaces

tasks.purpose: Define type-safe contracts for course progress and assessment scores data structures

constraints: Must export interfaces for reuse by widgets
Must handle null/undefined for users without data

tasks.input_state: Database types exist in packages/supabase/src/database.types.ts with course_progress and survey_responses tables defined
tasks.output_state: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts exists with exported TypeScript interfaces: CourseProgressData (completion_percentage, current_lesson_id, course_id, started_at, completed_at) and AssessmentScoresData (category_scores as Record<string, number>, completed, created_at)
tasks.acceptance_criterion: File exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts and exports CourseProgressData and AssessmentScoresData interfaces that compile without errors
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export interface CourseProgressData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts && grep -q 'export interface AssessmentScoresData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/types/dashboard.types.ts

tasks.name: Create loader function for dashboard progress data
tasks.purpose: Fetch course progress and survey response data using parallel Promise.all() pattern

constraints: Must use Promise.all() for parallel fetching
Must use React cache() wrapper for per-request caching
Must handle empty data gracefully (return null/undefined)
Must follow existing loader pattern from load-user-workspace.ts
Must use performant RLS pattern with (select auth.uid())

tasks.input_state: Types exist in dashboard.types.ts; course_progress and survey_responses tables exist with RLS policies; load-user-workspace.ts provides loader pattern reference
tasks.output_state: File apps/web/app/home/(user)/_lib/server/dashboard-progress.loader.ts exists with exported loadDashboardProgressData function that returns { courseProgress: CourseProgressData | null, assessmentScores: AssessmentScoresData | null } using parallel Promise.all() fetching
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Loader function exists, compiles without errors, uses Promise.all() for parallel queries, and returns correct type structure with null handling for missing data
tasks.verification_command: pnpm --filter web typecheck && grep -q 'export const loadDashboardProgressData' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-progress.loader.ts && grep -q 'Promise.all' apps/web/app/home/\(user\)/_lib/server/dashboard-progress.loader.ts

tasks.name: Wire loader to dashboard page component

action.target: page.tsx to import and call loadDashboardProgressData

tasks.purpose: Integrate loader function into existing page component to provide data to future widgets

constraints: Must call loader in async component body before JSX return
Must not break existing page structure (header, body)
Page component must remain async server component

tasks.input_state: Page component exists at apps/web/app/home/(user)/page.tsx with empty PageBody; loader function exists and is ready to call
tasks.output_state: Page component imports and calls loadDashboardProgressData, stores result in variable (currently unused but ready for widgets); page compiles and renders without errors
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Page component successfully imports loadDashboardProgressData, calls it before JSX return, and page loads without errors when navigating to /home
